brief: Opportunity is heavily concentrated in Brooklyn market-tier parcels utilizing a 485-x tax exemption paired with Section 8 VPS rents, where 918 total scanned deals pencil and generate cash-on-cash yields up to 18.3%. Brooklyn R7A and R7D lots offer substantial headroom between estimated land costs (based on the $439 PSF BK comp average) and walk-away land caps. By contrast, Bronx program-tier deals rely on ELLA/4% LIHTC stacks to generate developer fees but offer zero cash-on-cash return and near-zero walk-away land caps.

targets.play: Develop a 14-unit residential project using the 485-x tax exemption combined with Section 8 VPS rents to achieve an 18.3% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $690,612 vs. a walk-away land limit of $2,337,060 leaves $1,646,448 in headroom.
targets.risk: Requires navigating the city HPD/EDC RFP disposition process and verifying R7A zoning capacity.

targets.play: Construct a 12-unit residential building leveraging 485-x tax incentives and Section 8 VPS rents for a 16.9% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $591,738 vs. a walk-away land limit of $1,850,943 leaves $1,259,205 in headroom.
targets.risk: City-owned status requires RFP disposition tracking, alongside verifying site physical conditions and R7A bulk rules.

targets.play: Build a 13-unit residential asset under R7D zoning using a 485-x tax exemption and Section 8 VPS rents to deliver a 15.3% cash-on-cash yield.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $604,200 vs. a walk-away land limit of $1,861,160 leaves $1,256,960 in headroom.
targets.risk: Must verify R7D zoning overlays, site conditions, and HPD disposition requirements.

targets.play: Capture a $333,039 developer fee by delivering a 10-unit affordable project via an ELLA / 4% LIHTC stack.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $591,182 far exceeds the $57,379 walk-away land cap, requiring nominal land pricing through city disposition.
targets.risk: Requires winning a highly competitive public subsidy award and navigating HPD disposition.

process_note: These figures reflect early-stage screening estimates using borough land comps and require full site diligence, formal zoning verification, physical inspection, and tracking of upcoming HPD/EDC RFP dispositions.
disclaimer: AI interpretation of the engine's real screening output. Estimates pending diligence — not investment advice.
